name: agents
description: 嵌入式 IoT 开发技能库：Bug 根因分析、Crash Dump 分析、代码总结，以及"需求→方案→实施计划"完整需求实现链路，配合跨项目知识库语义检索

interface.shortDescription: Embedded IoT development skills and knowledge base
interface.longDescription: Specialized skills for embedded software development: bug root-cause analysis from logs, ARM crash dump analysis (Cortex-R and Cortex-M), code summarization, persistent knowledge base with vector semantic search, coding standards, and requirement management. Organized by chip platform (EC626, N58, UIS8852).
